reviews.comment:
Completo. Para recomendar. Agrandar los baños. Siempre gente esperando en el de mujeres. Más personal de playa.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Highly recommended. The restrooms need to be enlarged. There are always people waiting in the women's restroom. More beach staff are needed.
